$comment: FF-1..FF-8 fitness-gate map (OQ-2; guards BR-FF-1/2/3). Each FF names the Nx target(s) that enforce it. `active` FFs are CI-blocking: their backing targets must be defined AND invoked in the CI workflow, and their evidence fixtures/scripts must exist. `tracked` FFs are deferred (their AC-P-V dispatch fixtures do not exist yet): the backing target must be defined, but it is reported non-blocking with a `tracks` pointer until the fixtures land. FFDD (BR-FF-3): add or flip a row here, not code. Run via `@epa-wg/cem:fitness-gate-map`. See docs/fitness-functions.md.

gates.title: Negotiation determinism: same-MAJOR loads, unsupported MAJOR rejects, per axis
gates.tracks: AC-P-V-5 per-namespace version-negotiation fixtures not authored yet

gates.title: Isolation: no region interpreted by another content type's processor
Mode-disposition: unknown optional ignore/degrade/reject; must-understand rejects
gates.tracks: AC-P-V-6 unknown-namespace policy-determinism fixtures not authored yet

gates.title: Removal gate: zero in-repo consumers of a deprecated form + external window
SemVer-presence: every governed contract declares a version axis
XSLT capability-gating: unsupported XSLT version rejects; region isolated + version-pinned
gates.tracks: AC-P-V-4/V-7 embedded-XSLT version-pinning + legacy-opt-in fixtures not authored yet
